title: ruflo-test
tagline: What a 15-agent Byzantine-consensus swarm framework leaves behind when you point it at an empty repo.

title: Mindread
tagline: Paste the message you're about to send. Find out how it lands before the other person tells you.

title: oneword
tagline: A chatbot that answers anything — essay prompts, panics, jailbreak attempts — in exactly one word. Yes.

title: Lockin
tagline: Close the laptop mid-thought. Tomorrow every conversation and terminal is exactly where you left it.

title: Jarvis Dashboard
tagline: Seventeen tabs, a ticker tape, a pulsing brain-eye, and a $100k scoreboard. Iron Man suit not included.

title: Faceless
tagline: One daemon running ten anonymous TikTok brands: writes, voices, renders, schedules. Nobody on camera.

title: SavicAI
tagline: Watches a TikTok editor's whole catalog, learns his transition mix, then cuts your footage like he would.

title: brainstorm
tagline: Type one sentence, get a full project plan filed away for the day you have time to build it.

title: local-llm
tagline: OpenAI's open-weight 20B running on the laptop — ChatGPT-style UI included, wifi optional.

title: AI Stack Map
tagline: Click a task type and watch energy pulse along the wires to whichever brain actually handles it.

title: Sira
tagline: Siri with one letter swapped and the brain replaced: Apple ears, Claude thoughts, spoken back out loud.

title: animforge
tagline: Tells a free model to improve the animation, screenshots it, and argues until it renders clean.
